name: Chip
description: Compact selectable tag (Figma 538:6615) with a selection model — unselected is the base look. solid: gray.10 fill unselected, gray.70 fill with gray.0 text selected; outline-strong/weak: transparent with a gray.20 hairline unselected (outline-strong selected currently renders identically to solid, pending a design fix; outline-weak selected is gray.5 with a gray.50 border). Pressing nudges each state darker (unselected-pressed, selected-pressed) and disabled flattens to gray.20/gray.40. Sizes: md 14px/2-6 padding (base), lg 16px/2-8. prefix and suffix icon slots compose category and remove actions. Removable mode (react onRemove / static removable) locks the selected look, drops the toggle, and builds in an X button — the pattern Select's value chips reuse (Figma 506:696 suffix-icon=close).

slots.name: suffix-icon
slots.description: Removal/action icon after the label (e.g. close).

props.name: selected
props.description: Controlled 선택 값 (Figma state) — 비선택이 기본 모습. 생략하면 클릭 시 스스로 토글 (react).

props.name: onSelectedChange
props.description: Fires with the next value when the chip is toggled.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: 제거형 칩 (react) — 지정하면 선택된 모습으로 고정되고 X 버튼이 붙어요. 토글 대신 X 클릭이 이 콜백을 부르고 루트는 span이 돼요. 정적 타깃(web/hono)은 removable 불리언으로 같은 마크업을 렌더해요 (web은 podo-remove 이벤트).

states.name: selected
states.description: Figma selected: the filled look (solid/outline-strong gray.70 + gray.0 text, outline-weak gray.5 + gray.50 border).

states.name: active
states.description: Figma unselected-pressed/selected-pressed press feedback per theme.

accessibility.focusManagement: Chip is a native button; focus follows the platform.
